shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "git status --short && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' package.json && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- next config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "for f in pages/index.js pages/blog/index.js 'pages/blog/[id].js' pages/api/posts/index.js 'pages/api/posts/[id].js' pages/_app.js pages/_document.js pages/_error.js pages/404.js components/AppProvider.js styles/globals.css; do echo \"--- "'$f"; sed -n '"'1,260p' \""'$f"; done'
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "Next.js Pages Router to App Router migration route handlers layouts metadata types" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' package.json; printf '\\n--- lock next refs ---\\n'; rg '\"next\"|next@' package-lock.json | head -20"

/bin/bash -lc "rmdir pages/api/posts pages/api pages/blog pages 2>/dev/null || true
printf '%s\\n' '--- status ---'
git status --short 2>/dev/null || true
printf '%s\\n' '--- app files ---'
rg --files app components lib styles | sort
printf '%s\\n' '--- legacy references ---'
rg -n \"next/head|next/router|getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|next/document|pages/\" -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!**/.next/**'"' . || true
printf '%s\\n' '--- typecheck ---'
npx tsc --noEmit"
/bin/bash -lc "rg --files app components lib | sort && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,180p' tsconfig.json"

/bin/bash -lc 'test ! -d pages && echo '"'pages directory removed'; rg -n \"next/head|next/router|next/document|getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|Component\\s*,\\s*pageProps|res\\.status|req\\.method\" -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!**/.next/**'"' . || true"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
